subject: (no subject)
body:
Jeffrey dear!
I hope this note finds you well as always.

A member in my extended family passed away and it has huge effect on my
immediate family. Not my first time to lose a family member, but death
humbles you like nothing else.

The Croatian boy is the one standing by me as he has throughout the car
accident, lung infection, blow to lungs, and now death. He's adament about
not wanting to get back together and I need to come to terms with that he
feels great affection for me, but is not in love.

After 16 months in Dubai, affection beats love in my book.
God bless and take care of yourself. Much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Jeffrey dear!
I hope this note finds you well as always.
 
A member in my extended family passed away and it has huge effect on my immediate family. Not my first time to lose a family member, but death humbles you like nothing else.
 
The Croatian boy is the one standing by me as he has throughout the car accident, lung infection, blow to lungs, and now death. He's adament about not wanting to get back together and I need to come to terms with that he feels great affection for me, but is not in love.
 
After 16 months in Dubai, affection beats love in my book.
God bless and take care of yourself. Much love,
--
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
